Arr: AND event_time BETWEEN toDateTime($__from / 1000) - INTERVAL 20 MINUTE

AND type != 1 $conditionalTest( AND hostName() in ($hostname), $hostname) $conditionalTest( AND query_kind in ($query_kind), $query_kind) $conditionalTest( AND exception_code in ($exception_code), $exception_code) $conditionalTest( AND initial_user in ($user), $user)

query_hash] AND t BETWEEN $__from AND $__to GROUP BY normalized_query_hash, t ORDER BY count(t) OVER(PARTITION BY normalized_query_hash) DESC, sum(m) OVER(PARTITION BY normalized_query_hash) DESC LIMIT 200 BY t
arrayMap(i ->(query_start + i) * $interval * 1000, range(query_finish - query_start + 1)) as timestamps
